commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Move engine designer window out of the concurrency DMZ.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Split viewport rebuild from onframe call and move the rebuild out of the DMZ.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Move preparing ImGui out of the DMZ.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Revert "* Move preparing ImGui out of the DMZ."
This reverts commit a532ce0f9e2ece47f973c82f89dc035e343257af.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added text while Planet Renderer is loading on AMD 5000/6000 series GPUs on Windows to give context for long load times.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Revert viewport rebuild ordering change as this only happens on resizes, so shouldn't be a performance concern.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed OrbitSolver regression I caused that would cause occasional crashes, I had rushed the OrbitSolvers pattern to be non-blocking. It is now blocking on the main thread, but has plenty of time to run its course. This appears to solve the Job Busy exception.

commits.author: Chris
lines: Add an "Allow Multiple Windows" setting in Interface to disable windows leaving the main window
This is a temporary setting and will be replaced once a more elegant
solution comes along but should help users facing issues with tiling
window managers etc
This setting requires a restart

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Imported CoreElectricalA Assets.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Refactored particle emitters to get registered to a particle compute pipeline. Previously each emitter had their own compute pipeline. This is an important step towards setting up emitters to be pooled and reused without needing to allocate each time a particle emitter is created.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Imported CoreCouplingA Assets.
Updated CorePassageA Assets.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed flickering for small objects when drawn as distant sprites. We probably do what flickering, or "flashes" for say vehicles that are rotating but we should do this deliberately rather than it being a rendering artifact. This enabled more finer control over distant sprite handling by type, so I reduced the apparent size of things like asteroids so they are much more subtle.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Updated Grass biome Ambient sound.
Tweaked ocean ambience playback rules to avoid it playing too far inland.
Updated rocket engine mid-range stop Sounds.
Updated decouple sounds.
Fixed Engine stop sounds were not having sound parameters applied.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Particles now have a stable position in the world.

commits.author: Rocket
lines: Fixed crash due to ConcurrentWorker exception due to pending job. Now checking for state Idle, not just for not running.
Added first pass of a CLI structure.

Swapped the "disable multi-viewport" setting from previous commit, instead have support for a "-fixed-viewport" startup parameter. This will disable viewports from poppping out, which is a useful option especially for some linux configurations.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Moved the OnFrameEditor call back into the DMZ to resolve vulkan validation errors/timing.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Configure new docking port parts to function as docking ports.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Configure new battery parts to actually store Electicity.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Small change to RCS Lights to make sure they use exhaust color.
